evaluators.name: Cheapest Light-Gray Scandinavian 3-Seater Sofa in Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart contains the cheapest qualifying light-gray Scandinavian 3-seater sofa under $900 with rating ≥4, added with quantity 1.

evaluators.name: Home Office Desk, Chair, Lamp Under Budget Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user initially selected one qualifying desk, chair, and lamp with free shipping and correct constraints, and then applied the ≤$800 total rule by optionally removing the most expensive item.

evaluators.name: Living Room Makeover Next Tuesday 3PM Video Call Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a Living Room Makeover consultation as a video call at a Tuesday 3:00 PM slot, specifically the earliest such slot available.

evaluators.name: Account Creation and Small Apartment Living Room Article Favoriting Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that an account was created and that the first published article about small apartment living rooms or small spaces was saved to favorites.

evaluators.name: Style Quiz and Decor Cushion & Rug Under $60 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user completed the style quiz and added one cushion and one rug under $60 matching the recommended style, chosen from the highest-rated qualifying items.

evaluators.name: Custom Walnut Shelving Unit Saved Under $1200 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a walnut shelving configuration 250cm wide and 220cm high with at least 3 shelf modules and 1 cabinet module was created with total price ≤$1200 and saved.

evaluators.name: Extendable Solid Wood Dining Table Longer-Length Choice Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that among qualifying extendable solid wood dining tables for 6+ people under $1500, the user added to the cart the one with the greater extended length between the first two price-sorted results, with quantity 1.

evaluators.name: Bedroom Design Package Neutral Standard Email Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a quote request was submitted for a bedroom design package configured for a 12–15 m² room with a neutral palette and standard tier, using email as the preferred contact method.
